titleStmt.title: SII 10.155: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 155. (A.R. No. 707 of 1926.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE DHVAJASTAMBHA OF THE TEMPLE OF RĀMALINGASVĀMI, PINNALI, PALNAD TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. Ś. 1085 (Svabhānu).

summary.p: States that, during the reign of the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Anuṅgum Kāmarāju, 50 goats were entrusted to the custody of the four sons of Amarēśvara-Paṇḍita for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Rāmēśvara at Piṅgali. The chief is described as belonging to the Haihaya family.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī sakava¨rṣamulu 1085 Anēṁṭi śubhānu
saṁvatsara bhādrapada śuddha 10 Ādivāramuna
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara mailadēvikāmarā
ju koḍuku samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahā
maṁḍalēśvara Anēkōttuṁggataraṁgga saṁghāta
lavaṇōdadhivēlāvalayavalayitagaṁgā
pā¨ryyātamadhyadēśādhīśvara māhiṣmatīpu
ravarēśvara naihayavaṁśōdbhava nātrēya
gōtrapavitra natyugranaraśirōda¨rppaṇadhvaja
mahālpuraghōṣaṇasaṁpannu laina śrīmanmahā
maṁḍalēśvara yanuṁguṁgāmarājula di
rājya muttarōttarābhipravriddhiprava¨rddhamāna
mācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyi yai yuṁḍaṁ biṁgali
śrīrāmēśvaramahādēvara kakhaṁḍadīpamu Ā
caṁdrā¨rkkasthāyi yai yuṁḍa Amarēśvarapaṁ
ḍitula koḍukulu [A¨rkkādityu]berasina nalu
vura vasamuna niccina mēṁka 50 lekkana mēṁ
ka 50© sāmānyōyaṁ dha¨rmasētuṁ nṛpānāṁ
kālē kālē pālaniyyō bhavadbhi ssa¨rvvā nē
tān® bhāvini pā¨rtthivēṁdrā nbhūyō bhū
yō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ .
Digital edition of SII 10.155 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
